reasoning: The target of $140,000 represents roughly a 2x increase from current price levels of ~$65k-70k. The market freeze value of 23.5% neatly balances these perspectives, representing a reasonably well-calibrated crowd forecast for an aggressive price target during the post-halving bull-cycle year of 2025.
